race.comment: HOUDINI (1) gets one more chance fourth up. Three runs back have been good, just missing last time over 1732m at Sale when backed into an even money favourite. He comes back a notch in grade again here and should have no issue out to 2000m with Ethan Brown booked. SOMETHINGSOSTRONG (12) broke through for a narrow maiden win as favourite last time and can go on with it up in trip now. BAFFLECK (9) made good improvement second up when rising to 1950m. He should do so again here from a soft draw and is in the mix. PURLER PATCH (13) can mix his form but has claims on best while SIXTY GRAND (2) is lightly raced and can measure up.
